plugins.name: kvido-jira
plugins.description: Jira source — issue tracking, status changes (requires acli or Atlassian MCP)

plugins.description: Google Calendar source — schedule tracking, meeting alerts

plugins.name: kvido-sessions
plugins.description: Sessions source — Claude Code session analysis
